strategy_summary: Systematically queried PhosphoSitePlus for kinase-substrate-phosphosite relationships. Parsed datasets to extract kinase gene symbol, substrate gene symbol, phosphorylation site, heptameric peptide sequence, substrate UniProt accession, and supporting databases. Harmonized gene symbols using HGNC standard nomenclature and standardized phosphosite notation. Cross-referenced entries across datasets to merge supporting sources. Plan to expand to additional databases (SIGNOR, UniProtKB, Phospho.ELM, RegPhos 2.0, PhosphoPOINT, BioGRID, HPRD, STRING, KEGG) for exhaustiveness.
